expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab semver tag deployment, Vercel production readiness, Cloud Run deploy, and post-deploy smoke all completed successfully.

Monitoring source error contract now preserves sourceMode/queryAsOf through Cloud Run route serialization and BFF pass-through, and live source remains explicitly disabled instead of silently falling back.
The changed AI monitoring path was covered by deterministic unit/route tests plus release smoke without adding unnecessary live LLM calls.
Root, contract, and AI Engine test suites passed before release; GitLab CI deployment smoke confirmed production propagation.
The patch did not alter metric values or replay data semantics; it clarified unavailable live source behavior and preserved request queryAsOf metadata.

This was intentionally a targeted release smoke, not a broad Playwright UI QA; prior Playwright MCP review found current UI/UX satisfactory and this patch did not change the visible dashboard layout.
